description: 从算电协同到存储计算融合，从国产芯片到计算网络，中国算力突破之路尽收眼底。

titleEn: New Computing Power: The Water, Electricity, and Coal of the AI Era—An Infrastructure Revolution Reshaping National Fortunes
descriptionZh: 从算电协同到存储计算融合，从国产芯片到计算网络，中国算力突破之路尽收眼底。
descriptionEn: From computing-electricity synergy to storage-computing integration, from domestic chips to computing networks, a panoramic view of China's path to computing power breakthroughs. Computing power has evolved from a technical tool to a national infrastructure, standing alongside water and power grids.

title: 超越人形机器人概念：为什么自动驾驶是物理人工智能的第一个大规模商业赛道？
description: Autonomous driving is the most realistic and mature path for the implementation of Physical AI, while全域 unmanned delivery and urban public autonomous shuttle buses are the core主线 that determine whether the entire embodied intelligence industry can survive the capital cycle and achieve global sustainable development.

titleEn: Beyond Humanoid Robot Concepts: Why Autonomous Driving Is the First Large-Scale Commercial Track for Physical AI?
descriptionZh: Autonomous driving is the most realistic and mature path for the implementation of Physical AI, while全域 unmanned delivery and urban public autonomous shuttle buses are the core主线 that determine whether the entire embodied intelligence industry can survive the capital cycle and achieve global sustainable development.
descriptionEn: Autonomous driving is the most realistic and mature path for the implementation of Physical AI, while global unmanned delivery and urban public autonomous shuttle buses are the core thread that determine whether the entire embodied intelligence industry can survive the capital cycle and achieve global sustainable development.

title: 投资者看好，但养老机器人为何卖得不好？
description: The annual growth rate of emotional companion robots has reached 42%, ranking first among all categories. However, the difficulty of deploying this category in real-world applications remains high, mainly because the adaptation work after integrating large models into robots is still in a磨合 phase.
titleZh: 投资者看好，但养老机器人为何卖得不好？
titleEn: Investors are optimistic, but why are elderly care robots not selling well?
descriptionZh: The annual growth rate of emotional companion robots has reached 42%, ranking first among all categories. However, the difficulty of deploying this category in real-world applications remains high, mainly because the adaptation work after integrating large models into robots is still in a磨合 phase.
descriptionEn: The annual growth rate of emotional companion robots has reached 42%, ranking first among all categories. However, the difficulty of deploying this category in real-world applications remains high, mainly because the adaptation work after integrating large models into robots is still in a running-in phase.
